name: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. Units
summary: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. Units Each consisting of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant is a unit offering from GP-Act III Acquisition Corp, a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). Each unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one warrant, where a whole warrant entitles the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share. The company is based in New York.
